// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;

namespace TestAssembly
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Extension methods for registering services from TestAssembly.
    /// </summary>
    public static class TestAssemblyServiceCollectionExtensions
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Registers services. Services with tags are only registered when matching tags are passed.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="services">The service collection.</param>
        /// <param name="tags">Optional tags to filter which services to register.</param>
        public static global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection AddTestAssembly(this global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection services, params global::System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<string> tags)
        {
            if (!tags.Any())
            {
                services.AddKeyedSingleton<global::TestNamespace.KeyedService, global::TestNamespace.KeyedService>("myKey");
                services.AddKeyedSingleton<global::TestNamespace.IKeyedService>("myKey", (global::System.IServiceProvider sp, object? key) => sp.GetRequiredKeyedService<global::TestNamespace.KeyedService>(key));
                services.AddKeyedSingleton<global::TestNamespace.KeyedService2, global::TestNamespace.KeyedService2>(global::TestNamespace.MyEnum.Key1);
                services.AddKeyedSingleton<global::TestNamespace.IKeyedService>(global::TestNamespace.MyEnum.Key1, (global::System.IServiceProvider sp, object? key) => sp.GetRequiredKeyedService<global::TestNamespace.KeyedService2>(key));
                services.AddKeyedSingleton<global::TestNamespace.KeyedService3, global::TestNamespace.KeyedService3>(42);
                services.AddKeyedSingleton<global::TestNamespace.IKeyedService>(42, (global::System.IServiceProvider sp, object? key) => sp.GetRequiredKeyedService<global::TestNamespace.KeyedService3>(key));
            }

            return services;
        }
    }
}
